settings.confirmDeleteMessage:
This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted including:

• All transactions
• Settings and preferences
• Account access

This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted including:

• All transactions
• Settings and preferences
• Account access
confirm.restoreData.title: Restore Data
confirm.restoreData.message:
This will REPLACE all current transactions and settings with the backup:

• {{txCount}} transactions
• {{budgetCount}} category budgets
• {{billsCount}} recurring bills

Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

analytics.insights.spikes.title: Spending Spikes Detected
analytics.insights.spikes.text: {{count}} transaction(s) were more than 2x your average ({{average}}). Watch for unusually large purchases.
analytics.insights.spentPercent.title: Income Spent
analytics.insights.spentPercent.high: You've spent {{percent}}% of your income this period. Consider reducing expenses to increase savings.
analytics.insights.spentPercent.normal: You've spent {{percent}}% of your income this period. Good job keeping spending in check!
analytics.insights.weekendAlert.title: Weekend Spending
analytics.insights.weekendAlert.text: Your weekend spending ({{weekendAvg}}/day avg) is 30% higher than weekdays. Consider setting a weekend budget.
analytics.moneyHealthScore.concentration: High spending concentration in one category (-20)
analytics.pdf.insufficientData: Insufficient data to generate predictions. Add at least 2 months of transactions to unlock AI insights.
analytics.spendingPersonality.title: Spending Personality
analytics.spendingPersonality.intro: You spend {{percent}}% of your expenses on {{category}}.
analytics.spendingPersonality.descriptio: You spend heavily in one category. Could be housing, loans, or education. Monitor that category closely.
Most of your spending happens in the evening/night. Likely dining out or social activities.
You make many small purchases. They add up—consider bundling or planning expenses.
You make infrequent but large purchases. Plan ahead for these expenses.
Your spending is spread across many categories. Diverse but watch for small frequent leaks.
Your spending pattern is well-balanced. Keep it up!
analytics.suggestions.title: 💡 Smart Suggestions
analytics.suggestions.empty.title: All good!
analytics.suggestions.empty.message: No immediate suggestions. Keep tracking your expenses.
Your {{category}} spending is {{percent}}% of total. Try reducing it by 10% to save {{amount}}.
analytics.suggestions.diversifiedSpendin: {{percent}}% of your spending is in just 3 categories. Consider diversifying or reviewing all expense areas.
analytics.suggestions.lowSavingsRate.sug: Your savings rate is only {{rate}}%. Aim to save at least 20% of your income for financial health.
analytics.suggestions.noIncome.suggestio: No income recorded in the last 30 days. Make sure to log all sources of income for accurate analysis.
advisor.nonFinanceResponse: I can only help with financial and expense-related questions. Feel free to ask about budgeting, savings, expenses, investments, or any money management topics!
